old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-y4u1","title":"hop_limit not decremented for forwarded packets","description":"File: rust/lichen-ipv6/src/lib.rs:259-347

The Ipv6Header parsing and serialization code preserves hop_limit as-is. While the module explicitly states it doesn't handle routing, any future forwarding use would need to:

1. Decrement hop_limit before forwarding
2. Drop packets with hop_limit=0 (send ICMPv6 Time Exceeded)

Currently neither is implemented. If this module is used in a forwarding context without modification, it could create routing loops.

This is documented as out-of-scope ('no routing tables'), but worth noting for anyone extending the module.

Suggestion: Add a comment in Ipv6Header noting that forwarding implementations MUST decrement hop_limit, or add a decrement_hop_limit() method that returns Option<Self> (None if already 0).","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:34:04.517503Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:34:04.517538Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-y4u1","title":"hop_limit not decremented for forwarded packets","description":"File: rust/lichen-ipv6/src/lib.rs:259-347

The Ipv6Header parsing and serialization code preserves hop_limit as-is. While the module explicitly states it doesn't handle routing, any future forwarding use would need to:

1. Decrement hop_limit before forwarding
2. Drop packets with hop_limit=0 (send ICMPv6 Time Exceeded)

Currently neither is implemented. If this module is used in a forwarding context without modification, it could create routing loops.

This is documented as out-of-scope ('no routing tables'), but worth noting for anyone extending the module.

Suggestion: Add a comment in Ipv6Header noting that forwarding implementations MUST decrement hop_limit, or add a decrement_hop_limit() method that returns Option<Self> (None if already 0).","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:34:04.517503Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:31:05.045614092Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:31:05.045614092Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:36:05.045614092Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:31:05.045614092Z"}

new_value: Fixed off-by-one in with_decremented_hop_limit (now correctly returns None when decrement reaches zero per RFC 8200 §3); added independent test vector exercising preservation of other header fields, hop=5->4, and zero/1 cases. Updated doc comment. Only touched specified file. Test and logic verified.
